name: Priority Plumbing & Drains
address: 1594 Dupont St, Toronto, ON M6P 3S7, Canada

reviews.author: Alvin T.
reviews.text:
Will not use again because of steep pricing

**Note:
Just want to raise some red flags here based on the company's response after my original review:

(1) "The faucet installed was not a big-box retail model and is not sold at Home Depot. It is a higher-quality fixture. ... ... and long-term performance. The stainless finish also adds to the cost."

Red flag -  The technician had reassured us numerous times on the day of the service that the "stainless finish" costs the same as the chrome or other finish.This shows that the company has aggressively marked up the faucet or overcharged for their labor. The "higher-quality" faucet shown in the picture below should not cost you more than $500 as per Home Depot, even though it is not available through the retailer.

(2) "Your total price included ... ... the enrollment in a pre paid maintenance plan, plus all the applicable taxes."

Red flag - We were not made aware, clearly informed  or provided  with any copy of the "enrollment in a prepaid maintenance plan" as things were explained quickly and vaguely on a tablet by the technician and no such detail had ever been brought up. On top of that, the invoice did not mention any enrolment plan at all. In fact, the invoice with the Terms & Conditions was only emailed to us 30 mins after the technician left. Basically I was asked to sign something (on a tablet) that I had not been shown other than the signature box. Please make sure you ask and go through those important details to protect your consumer rights, as they were not very upfront about during the service call.
(updated on Feb 12, 2026)

Original review:
This was a weekday, non-emergency service call for a seized emergency shutoff hot water valve and slow-flowing hot water that costs us a total of $1939.22, after a “member savings” of $179.57 discount as indicated in the invoice.

The whole process took close to 2 hours from 9 to 11am, with 1 hour spent on the actual repair and replacement of two water valves + a new kitchen faucet (Moen brand regular pull down faucet, retail price ~ $250-$300 at Home Depot), the remaining time was spent on inspections, quote discussions and upselling.

The technician showed up on time to start off with a “full-system check” looking for potential plumbing issues within the house, even if you called them in for just one issue. Personally I thought it was great to have a professional plumber to go through and check the plumbing, and if you are comfortable with being upsold with various other services afterwards.

The technician was very personable and professional and we were happy with his service throughout, and our place was kept clean at the end of the repair. The repair/ replacement itself was a straightforward job, the undersink was cleared for the technician without any obstruction before he started. There was enough space to work around and it was an easy access to the valves and faucet.

We initially chose Priority Plumbing because we wanted to support local businesses as they are located in the community. We assumed that their pricing would be competitive and reasonable hence we did not think twice before agreeing to what the technician was proposing and quoting us. At the end of the day, we wanted it to be done by a reliable company that has been around for years.

Will we use them again? Probably not after finding out that there are better pricings out there for the same work which would cost way less than $1900! We did later ask Priority Plumbing for a detailed cost breakdown of what we had paid for since they only emailed the invoice to us after the technician left, which was 30 minutes later.

Their customer service team later responded, “because we are not a time and material company, there is no hourly rate and therefore I have no way of breaking down the price into a time and material cost. We work on a flat rate, upfront pricing system.”

So, you can decide for yourself if you want to pay a premium for a similar job that can be done by another company or licensed plumber for much less.

reviews.author: J
reviews.text:
Shoutout to Priority Plumbing, these guys are fantastic!

My Dad has used Priority Plumbing multiple times over the years, including two recent service calls to my grandpa’s apartment. Both experiences have been professional, thorough, and genuinely helpful.

They don’t just fix the immediate problem, they take the time to inspect the rest of the plumbing system and let you know about any potential issues down the road.

The first visit was great, and on the second one, we had Zachary come out. He replaced a worn-out fill valve? (The work was done a while ago and i forgot exactly what was done for the toilet, my bad) which had degraded over time from the harsh chemicals of a toilet tank cleaner (good to know and lesson learned. Avoid leaving those in the tank!).

While he was there, Zach also noticed a developing clog in the kitchen sink drain. The sink was still draining okay for now, but he explained that it would likely get worse over time and could become a much more expensive repair later. There was zero pressure or hard-sell tactics. Just clear, honest information so we could make an informed decision. We ended up having the pipes cleaned right then and there, as it felt like the smart proactive choice.

The whole team was excellent. The dispatcher (I unfortunately forgot her name) called ahead to ask if there was anything specific we wanted to mention, and I received a helpful text with a live tracking link so I knew exactly when Zach would arrive.

Overall, top-notch communication, honest advice, quality work, and no gimmicks. I’m not a homeowner yet, but when I am, Priority Plumbing will be my first call without hesitation!

reviews.author: masoud zhian
reviews.text:
I rarely leave reviews, but this experience has been extremely frustrating and costly.

I contacted this company for a recurring basement drain backup. After multiple visits, I was given different explanations each time, and each visit resulted in additional recommendations and charges, without a lasting fix.

I was first told the T-connection was the issue, which I replaced at my own expense. That did not resolve the problem. I was then told the kitchen and basement lines required flushing/hydro jetting.

A technician later suggested completing the hydro jet privately for cash, which I declined. I paid the company directly for the hydro jet service instead. When the technician returned, he initially refused to hydro jet the kitchen. After I insisted that the paid service be completed, the work appeared rushed and very brief.

Three days later, the kitchen sink backed up again. Another technician advised that the kitchen line was still full of grease and required proper hydro jetting, indicating the previously paid service was not completed as invoiced.

Since November 6, 2025, I have repeatedly tried to resolve this with the office. Promised callbacks never happened, calls are no longer being answered, and as of January 22, 2026, my kitchen remains unusable.

Based on my experience, I would caution others to be very careful and to get clear documentation of what work is actually being performed.

He succefuly uncloged the drain. He connected the cut drain pipe using the rubber connector, he reconnected everthing back as seen in the attached picture.For the moment everything was working, but next morning under the sink I found a lot of water. I called Drain King and I was connected with your employee
I asked him to come and take a look and see what the problem might be and fix it.

I am sorry, but this is not a professional aproach by Drain King.

reviews.author: Computer Dude
reviews.text:
Seems to me,  after a few quotes, this company is  the most competent bang for the buck you can find... You save money with this outfit.
Got an 'A' series toilet installed,(double or more money than big box stores 'B' series, but better everything),  American Standard Pro Cadet for my daughter to give her piece of mind , that it's good quality,  and done right.

They sent Marco down,  very nice professional young man, easy to  converse with, installed the unit, sealed it all up,(made it look pretty ), fixed the  bit of wobble , new supply line... hauled off the old one....easy peasy for me, lol......all  was good mostly, ....the box had the wrong seat, not a soft close.... pays to pay attention to what you are buying...one call to the office and they  delivered the correct seat next day. We just used the old seat  for now.
Marco is a plumber, not a janitor and I didn't expect him to wash the floor after, lol..it's all good
My daughter had issues with the old one, (probably 40 years old or more), and wanted it gone.
The extra expense getting the A series installed professionally, is worth it for her piece of mind,  knowing it's  top  quality  & all done professionally.
Spend a little more now, for less headaches later.
This new Pro Cadet fit nearly perfect on the floor  over how the old one sat, which had a more square ish front.  Even better, because the base is a touch wider with a much smaller tank and sat evenly on  the new floor.. just a bit more gap behind at he wall..might have to brace it.
Far better performance. Always do your floor first,  THEN  get a new toilet! ( or measure carefully)
I would not hesitate to use Fowler for anything else  plumbing I need in the future.  My new go-to plumbing place!

What really sets them apart is their honesty, transparency, and hard work. A job in my opinion should have taken two full days was completed in just one day efficiently, cleanly, and with extreme attention to detail. We felt confident and taken care of every step of the way.

He has a customer as long as I live in this area.

reviews.author: Alaina Van Boxtel
reviews.text:
Full disclaimer - I've not had any services completed by this company - but I am wildly impressed with their customer service and it deserves mention.
I woke up this morning to my furnace being offline and frantically started dialing companies to have a tech come out. One of which was Handy Bros. Their AI Bot answered because of their high call volume and advised there was no appointments available til Monday.
About 20 mins later, I got a call from their VP of Operations, who said that she saw the call had come in and I hadn't booked so she wanted to personally reach out to see if she could assist. Luckily, within that 20 mins, I was able to book someone else, which I shared with her. She seemed genuinely happy to hear this, even though I was booked in with a competitor. She provided me with her personal number and said to reach out to her directly if something happened that the other tech couldn't come - they didn't want to leave us without heat with an impending storm coming tomorrow.
So while I did ultimately go with someone else, the customer service experience I received tells me that going with this business would've been an exceptional choice! They clearly value their customer's experience, which makes all the difference.
Thanks Handy Bros!

When he completed the inspection, he presented me with a report outlining about $3200 repairs, that were highly recommended. In addition he suggested I have someone in to quote me on a new furnace. He was very diligent about cleaning up his work space. As an added bonus, he took away the old faucet to be recycled. Very impressed with the professionalism and quality of work. I would highly recommend John the Plumber.

reviews.author: Madeline H
reviews.text:
Another great experience with Aaron from John the Plumber in the books. Aaron is professional, knowledgeable, and kind - all the things we want when someone comes to our home to provide a service. He was patient with our barky dog (befriended her in minutes), remembered being at our house and checked in casually about the issue we had last time, and finished the task at hand quickly and with explanations of things we should know.
I asked Aaron if I could take a picture of him with our dog (then sitting next to him as he worked), and I posted it to my personal instagram. A friend wrote to me, "That's Aaron! He's been to our house. He's great."

reviews.author: Anne-Marie Doupagne
reviews.text: I recommend Brad from John the Plumber. I have one washroom and my toilet was not flushing properly. Brad from John the Plumber came on the same day that I placed the call for the repair. Brad is very professional, knowledgeable, and provided advance notice of his arrival. He provided an assessment with a quote and did the repair efficiently.  I spoke with Krista to place the request for the repair and she was very kind and efficient on the phone to place the request.  I would not hesitate to recommend John the Plumber to friends and family, and I will call them again for any plumbing issues in the future.

reviews.author: Pierre
reviews.text: Garrett and Owen from John the Plumber were fantastic to work with. They showed up on time, treated my home with real care, and left zero mess. Their approach to leak detection was extremely thorough, and they walked me through everything with clear, and practical advice. It turned out to be something completely different than what I thought and these two nailed it. The bonus is that the price is very competitive. I’d happily recommend them to anyone looking for reliable plumbing help.

name: The Super Plumber - Ottawa
address: 1181 Parisien St Unit B, Ottawa, ON K1B 4W4, Canada

reviews.author: Kimberly Grant
reviews.text: Billy and Seamus were great. They were able to take a quick look at my sink , identify what was wrong and fix it within the same day. Our sink was out of order due to a clog for 3 days , and they not only unclogged it but also replaced the corroded parts. They were so polite and my dog loved them too. Great job ! Very happy with the service.

reviews.author: Michael
reviews.text: Catlin was awesome. Showed up on time, explained the work very well, offered his advice and was done at a very reasonable price. He replaced two corroded copper pipes in an hour and the work was very high quality..  I also had an outdoor faucet replaced by Sean last year and he also did a fantastic job. I highly recommend these guys.

reviews.author: Madona-G W
reviews.text:
I called for a plumber, after hours, because my sump pump stopped working and was flooding my front door. Sean A. came over and was able to assess the situation right away. He was thorough in his investigation, provided multiple options for repair and offered a temporary solution to redirect the water from the sump pump to prevent anymore flooding out front, until the insurance contractor was able to come and perform their inspection.
Overall, he was very professional and provided great service. I would use this company again, for sure!

reviews.author: Gail Gall
reviews.text: We were very pleased working with Sean A. and Super Plumber.  He listened to our needs, concerns and requests.  He gave us several choices of toilets and we chose the perfect one for our bathroom (even though we couldn't get grey--thank goodness).  We will not hesitate to work with Francis and Super Plumber for any of our future installations.

reviews.author: Marla Sullivan
reviews.text: We recently contacted Francis Home environment due to a leaking pipe under our sink. They sent Sean A. from Anchor and he was amazing. Quickly diagnosed the problem, had the parts available, identified another serious issue and fixed both problems the same day. Priority issues were handled with ease. I highly recommend this group of expert providers. They provide excellent service quality at a fair price and are trustworthy.

name: The Irish Plumber
address: 1405 Raven Ave, Ottawa, ON K1Z 7Y5, Canada

reviews.author: Craig Rue
reviews.text:
#1) In October 2025 a tooth brush cover accidentally dropped into our main level bathroom sink because the sink stopper broke and I removed the stopper, my wife was concerned that it may cause a leak or a severe clog or something.
They came and installed the kind of bathroom sink stoppers that you press down until it clicks and it’s closed, and then press again and it clicks and pops open. (I don’t like the type that work using a “lift rod handle”, so I like these stoppers).
Since they were already here and the had the time we asked them to replace the upstairs bathroom fixture with a MOEN Liso single handle fixture they had in their truck, the old fixture had a loose handle and sometimes dripped if not properly shut off. We’ve had one month to get used to the new fixture and we like it very much. The handle is very smooth, and it’s easy to set the water temperature and flow rate. We’re both glad that we got the work done.
We also had water that was leaking down through the fixture cover plate in the main level washroom, and he was nice enough to come back and apply a caulking around it + the kitchen fixture as well, I wish that had been done when they were originally installed.

#2) In March of 2022 we had a small leak from the base of our main level toilet, and they came and replaced the toilet flanges of our 2 toilets, as well as a couple of other items.
The toilet stopped leaking, and they both have been fine for the past 2.5 years.

reviews.author: S Parisien
reviews.text:
Quick service, but extremely pricey.
They charge a full service-call fee on top of the job itself, which adds up fast. For comparison, I paid $169 for the same type of work from another company two years ago. This time, with The Irish Plumber, the total was $549.
A big jump — definitely something to be aware of.

reviews.author: Nancy Johns
reviews.text: We're very happy with the service we got from Michael. He arrived on time, quickly assessed the problem, clearly presented options and resolved our problem to our satisfaction. This is the 3rd time we've used The Irish Plumber and each time we are satisfied with their work, professionalism and communications.

reviews.author: Ian Heide
reviews.text: We called The Irish Plumber for an urgent plumbing problem at our house recently. Over the phone they were friendly and thorough. They arranged to come as soon as possible that same day and than came earlier because of a cancellation, so that was great! They explained the procedures they would do and the associated costs. The problem was rather complex but they stayed until it was resolved. We were very satisfied with the experience.

reviews.author: Kelly Taylor
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about my experience with the Irish Plumber Company!  I had a plumbing issue that needed to be addressed at my condo in Ottawa, that my daughter lives in. I was a little nervous with not being familiar with businesses in the area and having to have my daughter look after the situation.  I received an appointment earlier than I expected and they showed up exactly when they said they would. They were so amazing dealing with my daughter and were so patient.  It turned into a problem where the shut off for the water was unable to be located by the Super or Maintenance of the building.  They did everything that they possibly could to help to locate it.  They spent at least an hour trying to work with the maintenance in locating it, which was unbelievable.  They finally had to leave, but made an appointment to return at a time that would not interfere with my daughter’s classes.  The shut off was not located until the building drawings were located. After they had been there, I was sent an email giving me an upfront quote and detailing what needed to be done by Micheal.  I was completely kept in the loop of what was happening.  Again they showed up when they were scheduled and completed the work in the time frame they gave, so that no classes were missed.  I would highly recommend their company!  They were honest and straight forward to deal with!

name: B&W Plumbing
address: 50 Cleopatra Dr, Ottawa, ON K2G 0B3, Canada

reviews.author: Karen M
reviews.text: We had many long outstanding plumbing issues .  When we called Corey and Graham they were very kind to come quickly to assess the situation and gave us an estimate promptly. They did an exceptional job.  They both are knowledgeable in their trade.   They have excellent customer service skills and made us feel comfortable with the work they completed. Thanks for all your kindness and generosity in this trying situation.  Would definitely recommend B&W  plumbing.

reviews.author: monica zarth
reviews.text: I called them Friday night before a long weekend because my kitchen sink was clogged. Graham was super professional telling me upfront about the rates for after hours service and sharing his availability for the next day. He came on Saturday morning at the exact time he said he would and was again extremely professional, careful not to mess up everything and did the job very quickly. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jaroslav Zenchuk
reviews.text: Pleasant to deal with, professional, honest, efficient and thorough--Graham and Colin of B&W Plumbing are a credit to their trade.  Their focus is on complete customer satisfaction.  Their pricing is fair, and they stand by their work with excellent warranties.  And, unlike their competitors, they won't charge you $79 just to come and have a look at your situation.  Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Kirk
reviews.text: Highly recommend Corey and Graham for your plumbing needs. Professional, punctual and very knowledgeable. They responded quickly, the issues and causes were clearly explained and it was fixed effectively. The work was fairly priced, I would definitely call them again.

reviews.author: Nick Ghattas
reviews.text: Graham was fantastic in helping us during an emergency and also working with us on a bathroom renovation later on. I'm really glad we found B&W, they'll definitely be our go to for any future work!

name: Offset Plumbing
address: 164 First Ave, Ottawa, ON K1S 2G4, Canada

reviews.author: Dale Pelletier
reviews.text: Offset plumbing helped us tremendously when our entire main sewage line was clogged and backed up. They managed to unclog it on a timely basis and also at a good price. I highly recommend for future emergencies. I also found Mickey to be very transparent with the work and the pricing. Thank you again!

reviews.author: A. Ollivierre
reviews.text: I am so happy with Liam and Offset Plumbing Company. We had a bathtub blockage and after trying everything unsuccessfully, Liam came and within a few minutes, he was able to fix it! Very impressive as I was worried that it was going to be a more serious fix. I highly recommend this company. Very friendly, helpful and efficient! Great service! A.O.

reviews.author: Adrien F
reviews.text:
Easy to set up appointment over the phone. Came when expected.

Nolan was great to come fix a broken toilet flange. No issues after he left and happy with the result.

He was transparent on what caused the issue and Offset was transparent, accurate, and fair on the cost of the repairs.

Would definitely call them back for any future plumbing needs.

Thank you!

reviews.author: Debbie
reviews.text: I contacted Offset Plumbing to do some work for me. The plumber was very professional. I am completely satisfied, will definitely use this company in the future.

reviews.author: Luis Martinez
reviews.text: The plumber came at home to repair a toilet and the service was good and quick. The plumber fixed something else that was not observed originally but he worked hard to return the toilet to service.quickly even not having scheduled the work for that long. Happy to work with them again and thanks for the  work completed.

name: Canada Plumbing
address: 5330 Canotek Rd Unit 22, Ottawa, ON K1J 9C1, Canada

reviews.author: Michael Hui
reviews.text: I've had Canada Plumbing two different houses, both Jamie and Corey. 100% happy each time. Corey just came for a smaller repair: great communication, on time, clean, professional dressed, professional demeanor, fast and right to work, no sound/ issues at all, price was exactly as quoted and expected for this job. Painless repair and service. Was a few hurdles for him to overcome but Corey found solutions. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Monica Young
reviews.text: Jamie was great! The service was fast, courteous and very professional. We were extremely happy with the results of having our drains unclogged. Jamie also provided a nice walk through of our plumbing to point out potential issues we may want to fix in the future. 100% would recommend.

reviews.author: Burhan Bayatli
reviews.text: I called this company on Sept.16,2022. Jamie was responsive that he came afternoon and completed the work on the same day I called. professional & expert in his job, polite very flexible & cooperative. He was well equipped with tools and did a clean job flawlessly. He planned and executed his task:(troubleshoot kitchen clogged pipe, removed the old drain and installed new double sink drains) and left the area spotless.I am happy with Canada Plumbing and I recommend it for future customers.

reviews.author: Brenda Wardle
reviews.text: EXCELLENT SERVICE!  In May 2023, I called on a Sunday after water came through a main floor light fixture. I spoke to Jamie right away who took time to answer my questions. Corey arrived on time for the scheduled appointment and was prepared with quick access to everything he needed. After diagnosing the issue, he made quick work of exploring minimally invasive options. He opened up a wall in a way that would make it easy to repair and replaced the leaking copper supply lines and valve for our acrylic shower stall. He tested the work carefully before cleaning up. Corey even vacuumed inside the wall! There was superb communication throughout the process and very reasonable pricing. Jamie and Corey are everything you're looking for in a worry-free plumbing service!

reviews.author: Native Made
reviews.text: Thank you Jamie!  Thank you for being the first plumber to answer the phone when I had a plumbing emergency at home.  Thank you for coming even though you already had a full schedule, plus long working days and still spent hours with us fix our issues and to explain everything that was wrong and what our options were.  You even took the time to fix a broken sink connection while you were here, which had nothing to do with our emergency call.  Your services really were above and beyond and incredibly appreciated.

name: Its Plumbing
address: 1680 Woodward Dr Unit 206, Ottawa, ON K2C 3R7, Canada

reviews.author: Rollande Pilbrow
reviews.text:
Hello plumbing service seekers!
We recently had a kitchen renovation/gut job. Brian came and he did an excellent job, he's very friendly and you can tell that he loves his job. What I appreciated is the cleaning of the area once he was all done! Great Job! 👏👍and thank you very much Brian 😊

reviews.author: Phil J
reviews.text: We utilized their services for a Gas Hot water tank and our Furnace and AC. When we reached out, a reply came very quickly which was greatly appreciated. All installs went smooth and the service is professional and courtious. Furnace units wern't in abundance and Shane went out of his way to find a suitable one for our house at a market competitive/ reasonable cost. 100% reccommend them to others requiring gas & water services.

reviews.author: Kevin Goyette
reviews.text:
Ryan, Shane and the team at Its Plumbing handled all the plumbing for our new build in 2023. Shane was great to deal with from always being responsive and willing to help us with fixture suggestions. They worked around our schedule and job was completed without any surprise costs. We are located in a rural area and they are able to handle the hot water tank, well water connection and the water softener system.

I will use them again in the future and would recommend them to family and friends.

reviews.author: Thomas Hartwig
reviews.text: Few weeks back I had Shane come and repair the main waterline valve coming into my home! He came shortly after I called. Great guy! Awesome plumber. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Shiro
reviews.text: He didn’t seal my sink drain pipe and as the ground shifted over a few years, the pipe separated and I ended up paying $1,500 to fix a bulkhead soaked with water.Then I asked him for drywall contacts and he sent me two duds. Finally, I asked him for feedback regarding a fridge water/ice line and he never got back to me. I just don’t trust Shane and wouldn’t do business with him again.

name: PenTech Plumbing & Mechanical
address: 900 Lady Ellen Pl, Ottawa, ON K1Z 5L5, Canada

reviews.author: Dustin B
reviews.text: Sam was amazing, very thorough and clearly knows his stuff! Very friendly and honest, clearly explained the issue and our options, was an absolute pleasure to deal with! Had a bit of an emergency situation with a main drain clog and Sam was here in less than two hours as he said he would after finishing up a previous job. Could not be happier that I called PenTech, highly recommend!

reviews.author: T S
reviews.text: When it comes to plumbing you stay away from Kijiji and average joes... we went with Pentech for one reason and one reason only...! I had never seen so many 5 star reviews. Sam was respectful to my elder parents and explained things. They didn’t try to upsell a penny. Sam came to my parents house exactly on time and did a great job. At the end of the day, my 82 year old dad is an old school engineer and he’s picky about everything. My dad was very happy with the conversion of a 2 handle shower into a single handle. He also helped change the outside faucet. EXCELLENT WORK!

reviews.author: Angela Hamm
reviews.text: I am very happy with the plumbing work that Sam from Pentech did for us. We had a hot water tank replaced! Our old one was leaking and he didn't waste anytime in getting here and replacing it before we had a flood. He also did an awesome job on my dishwasher install. He is very professional and goes out of his way to make sure the job gets done properly!  I highly recommend him and would use him for all my future plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Berrin Sun
reviews.text: We called for a blocked drain and received courteous and professional service for the next day. The technician was very diligent with his work and left our bathroom clean and the drain unclogged. We would strongly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Skin Revival Cosmetic Injectables
reviews.text: Professional and very responsive! Technician came on time, and they were nice enough to work around my busy schedule. Pricing options for my new faucet and sink were explained well, prior to installation, and technician was courteous and polite while answering all my questions. Overall a great experience. Would definitely use again for service work, and future renovations. The dispatch team was also very flexible and patient with me while fitting me in for an installation job. Thanks again!

name: John The Plumber Orleans
address: 348 Omer Lacasse Ave, Orléans, ON K1E 2X8, Canada

reviews.author: Victoria Harris
reviews.text:
We had a great experience with John The Plumber. Brad, our plumber, and the dispatch team were very kind and helpful right from the start. They notified us 15 minutes before arriving and showed up exactly within the appointment window.

Brad was professional and friendly. He fixed our problem efficiently. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Aaron Paulin
reviews.text:
The assistance that I got from your team at John The Plumber was incredible with both the dispatch team and the contractors that came to the house to help me with the work.

I am thrilled at how fast the company was able to send contractors over to give me a hand as I am currently renovating my only shower in the house and hit a bit of a snag with the plumbing fixtures that needed to be resolved before having the chance to proceed with other work.

The contractors I worked with were Garrett and Owen and honestly could not have had a better experience. They let me know when they were on route to the house, were extremely professional, friendly and helpful.

I would happily recommend John The Plumber to others in the future and return for any other needs that I may have as well. Much appreciated for the help with everything.

reviews.author: Karen Ross
reviews.text: Tomas from John The Plumber was great! Very informative and professional. He let us know his ETA so we knew when to expect him. He was able to diagnose the problem quickly and provide us with a quote for the scope of work and it was very reasonable. Would recommend using John The Plumber!!

reviews.author: Carrie Anne
reviews.text:
I had a fantastic experience with Eric from John the plumber— I had purchased a new house and he was very thorough in fixing all the plumbing under my kitchen sink, as well as the main shut offs on my toilets, and a new faucet in my tub fixture and a new shut off valve —And with testing the lines he noticed a leaking pipe in my furnace room, by the P-trap, which would’ve cost me a ridiculous amount of money from
Flooding from the kitchen sink — The previous owners did their own makeshift plumbing, and he made everything up to code again — He also helped fix my dishwasher and noticed a drain tube for my laundry tub that was not Properly installed.

And probably the best part was, he explained everything he was doing as a new homeowner that was exceedingly helpful if not priceless—  Very thorough highly recommended, professional, clean, would not hesitate to call again!!

reviews.author: Leroy & Colleen
reviews.text:
We called John the Plumber to request service. From the time I explained our problem the customer service representative was very helpful. The next day we got an appointment for the plumber to come and evaluate our issues. Tomas presented himself in a professional manor he took the time to understand the problem and suggested a number of options for us to consider. He recommended to turn the hot water tank and give it a try.  Well done Tomas will monitor the results.
Thanks again for the excellent service and advice
Leroy
